title: Sample Promotional Video Storyboard
shooting_notes: Shoot in 16:9 and keep essential faces and props inside the central 9:16 area.
Do not use a fixed title overlay.
Do not place required readable text inside the drawings.

cuts.action: The presenter leans slightly toward the group and delivers the opening line.
cuts.vertical_crop: Keep the presenter's eyes and mouth inside the central area.
cuts.dialogue: Presenter: We are ready to begin.

cuts.action: Participant A and Participant B exchange a silent glance while Participant A reaches toward a blank prop.
cuts.vertical_crop: Keep both faces and the reaching hand inside the central area.

cuts.action: Participant A rises halfway and extends one open palm, stopping the group's movement.
cuts.vertical_crop: Keep Participant A's face and extended hand between the crop guides.

cuts.action: The presenter raises a blank presentation board as the participants stop and turn toward it.
cuts.vertical_crop: Keep the presenter, board, Participant A, and primary reactions near the center.
cuts.sound: A quiet reveal hit, then silence.
